LanguageData.ARA_Hostile_Hive.label: Arachne's legions cut off their beards
LanguageData.ARA_Hostile_Hive.description: After the Arachne hive fleet that invaded the Glittering World was defeated by the Glittering World coalition forces, the remaining insect swarm individuals remained in the star field. Since these insect swarm individuals are unable to establish contact with the hive network, their self-organized abnormal network has only low intelligence, which can only allow its members to act like beasts - however, they are still a group of dangerous enemies, and the genetic reflexes left behind by countless enemies have made them as sharp as ever. \n\nThey will not show mercy to anyone, even if their opponents are members of their own race.
